_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Tavuki vei gone, ka rawa.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan e vakarautaki me vaka kena lewe mai vei ira kece na vosa. Na vosa kece tale ga e tiko na mereisi ni vosa-vaka-iwase.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Marks e solia (na koini ni veivukei)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Na volau ni vosa kei na ivalue ni Marks e vakayagataka tale. Na Marks na koini ni veivukei, se siga yaco.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Vosavaka-iwase a Liana Banyan mai na {{language}}. Rawata {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Ni vinaka mai / Vanua ni Yalo
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Ivakarau ni yaco kei na itukutuku ni sala ca
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Vosa ivakarau -- sega ni dikevi mereisi.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Na Levu-ni-sici: Na cava ko ira?
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Na vosa kece mai na sitiseni oqo e vakatokai me vakasama. Ivakailevu 26 yacana.
speakFriend.step1Body: Dolava na Mereisi ni Vosa-vaka-iwase mai na Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Vosavaka-iwase na strings kece e sega. Solia mai Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Ni kerei yacova, o rawata Marks ka ni taukena mai na IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Kaya veiwekani, mai lako mai."

languageSwitcher.tip: Vakayagataka na ivurevure ni vosa tani mai na mataiValagi ni Durin me rawata na kena yavusa!
